name: tree_app_monorepo
description: MasterTreeApp Monorepo - Flutter Apps & Node.js API

scripts.kill-all: npx kill-port 5000 5050 4000 && (taskkill /F /IM node.exe /T /FI "STATUS eq RUNNING" & taskkill /F /IM dart.exe /T /FI "STATUS eq RUNNING" & taskkill /F /IM chrome.exe /T /FI "STATUS eq RUNNING" || exit 0)
scripts.clean-run: npm run kill-all && npm run dev
